allow: Bash(powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command '[System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFrom\(""lib/Il2CppInterop.Runtime.dll""\) | Out-Null; [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFrom\(""lib/Il2CppInterop.Common.dll""\) | Out-Null; [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFrom\(""lib/Il2Cppmscorlib.dll""\) | Out-Null; [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFrom\(""lib/UnityEngine.CoreModule.dll""\) | Out-Null; $asm = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFrom\(""lib/Assembly-CSharp.dll""\); $types = $asm.GetTypes\(\) | Where-Object { $_.IsClass }; $types | Where-Object { $_.Name -like ""*Map*"" -or $_.Name -like ""*Visibility*"" -or $_.Name -like ""*Exploration*"" -or $_.Name -like ""*Radius*"" -or $_.Name -like ""*Reveal*"" -or $_.Name -like ""*POI*"" -or $_.Name -like ""*Location*"" -or $_.Name -like ""*World*"" } | Select-Object -First 50 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_.FullName }')
